bugs.error_message: Ghost OTP verification — handleVerify() fakes success without any API call
bugs.root_cause: OTP verify button called setTimeout to set status='success' without hitting any backend endpoint. Users could fake-verify without actually verifying their email.
bugs.fix: Removed OTP input/verify UI entirely. Page now shows email-link-only flow with a resend button. OTPInput component kept for future use.

bugs.error_message: No rate limiting on auth API routes — register, forgot-password, reset-password, verify-email all unbounded
bugs.root_cause: Auth endpoints had no request throttling, allowing brute-force and email spam attacks.
bugs.fix: Created in-memory IP-based rate limiter at lib/auth/rate-limit.ts. Applied to all auth routes with appropriate limits per endpoint.

bugs.error_message: Reset-password page accepts expired/invalid tokens — shows form before validating
bugs.root_cause: Page only checked for token presence (!token) but never validated it against the DB. User could fill out the form with an expired token and only learn it failed on submit.
bugs.fix: Added GET handler to reset-password API for pre-validation. Page now calls GET /api/auth/reset-password?token= on mount. Shows skeleton while checking, error if invalid/expired, form only when valid.

bugs.error_message: Email verification shows 'Invalid or missing verification token' even though token is valid and email gets verified
bugs.root_cause: React StrictMode double-mounts in dev, causing two HTTP requests to the server. AbortController only cancels the client-side promise — the first server request still executes, consuming the token (setting it to null). The second request then can't find the token and returns 400, which the client displays as the final state.
bugs.fix: Don't clear verificationToken on successful verification. Keep the token so both requests find the same user. The `emailVerified` check returns success for the second call without mutating again (true idempotency). Token expires naturally (24h) and gets overwritten on resend.

bugs.error_message: verify-email page infinite loop: verify-email API 200 → session → login redirect → verify-email API 200 → repeating
bugs.root_cause: Two bugs working together: (1) useEffect fires before useSession() finishes loading, so `session` is null in the .then() closure even for logged-in users → always takes the else branch → redirects to /login?verified=true instead of calling updateSession(). (2) JWT callback had `if (trigger === 'update' && session)` — calling updateSession() without args passes session=undefined, so DB re-fetch was skipped and isEmailVerified stayed false in JWT. Result: proxy sees stale JWT with isEmailVerified:false → bounces /feed → /verify-email endlessly.
bugs.fix: Wait for sessionStatus !== 'loading' before firing verify fetch (added sessionStatus to useEffect deps). Use sessionStatus === 'authenticated' instead of session truthiness for branching. Changed JWT callback to `if (trigger === 'update')` (removed `&& session`) so updateSession() without args still re-fetches from DB.

bugs.error_message: Cannot destructure property 'locale' of 'initPageResult' as it is undefined
bugs.root_cause: Used AdminViewServerProps (global custom view type with initPageResult) for a collection-level list view override. Collection list views receive ListViewServerProps which has payload, user, i18n, etc. directly on props — NOT nested under initPageResult. Also, DefaultTemplate wrapper is not needed for collection list views since Payload already wraps them in the admin shell.
bugs.fix: Changed props type from AdminViewServerProps to ListViewServerProps, removed DefaultTemplate wrapper and SetStepNav, access payload directly from props instead of props.initPageResult.req.payload

bugs.error_message: react-hooks/set-state-in-effect: Calling setState synchronously within an effect body
bugs.root_cause: setFetchState called directly in useEffect body before fetch() — synchronous setState in effect is forbidden by lint rule
bugs.fix: Removed isLoading from state. Derived it from fetchedData.query !== debouncedQuery comparison. Only call setFetchedData in .then()/.catch() callbacks (async, allowed).

bugs.error_message: Hydration failed because the server rendered HTML had a nested button inside a button
bugs.root_cause: A <button> for removing recent searches was nested inside a parent <button> element — invalid HTML causes hydration mismatch
bugs.fix: Changed inner <button> to <span role="button" tabIndex={-1}> with onKeyDown handler for Enter/Space

bugs.root_cause: Dashboard routes /learn/* and /tag/* not in config.matcher — requests bypassed auth gate

bugs.error_message: Blocked user redirect loop in proxy.ts
bugs.root_cause: Blocked users redirected to /login, but /login is in AUTH_ROUTES which passes through before blocked check — however if session persists and matcher catches /login, infinite redirect possible
bugs.fix: Added guard: if blocked user is already on an AUTH_ROUTE, allow through instead of redirecting

bugs.error_message: Rate limiter shared counter across all routes
bugs.root_cause: Key was IP-only — hitting /register 5 times would block /forgot-password from same IP
bugs.fix: Changed key to ip:pathname so each route has independent counter

bugs.error_message: JWT revalidation DB error crashes callback, signs out all users
bugs.root_cause: No try-catch around DB query in jwt callback — transient DB error returns unhandled rejection
bugs.fix: Wrapped revalidation block in try-catch — on error, keeps stale token
